creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Ack!  What am I doing...  I didn't mean to close this one (time to get 
some sleep :). 

So long as I'm in the audit-trail, I'll note that i386/4951 (closed) 
is related.  The specific problem is apparently keyboard-related. 
i386/4951 contains much more information, and the person who closed it 
should probably have made an exception to the "close the newer PR when 
closing dups" ruls.
